instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `0f9e364` from the reflog and cherry-picked it onto `master` as `21117b8`.

- Resolved the about-page conflict using the newer Stanford content.
- Working tree is clean.
- Confirmed Stanford text appears in both updated files.
- Jekyll build unavailable because Bundler/Jekyll isn’t installed.

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- reflog --
' && git reflog --date=iso -20 && printf '
-- recent all --
' && git log --all --oneline --decorate --graph -20
git show --stat --summary 0f9e364 && printf '\n-- diff --\n' && git show --format=fuller --find-renames --find-copies 0f9e364 --
git status --short --branch && git cherry-pick 0f9e364 || { echo '-- conflict status --'; git status --short; echo '-- conflicted about --'; cat _includes/about.md; }

git checkout --theirs _includes/about.md && git add _includes/about.md && GIT_EDITOR=true git cherry-pick --continue && printf '\n-- result --\n' && git status --short --branch && git log -3 --oneline --decorate && print

cat Gemfile && printf '\n-- build --\n' && if command -v bundle >/dev/null 2>&1; then bundle exec jekyll build; elif command -v jekyll >/dev/null 2>&1; then jekyll build; else echo 'Jekyll/bundler unavailable'; exit 3; f
git status --porcelain=v1 && git show --check --oneline HEAD && grep -nE 'Postdoctoral Researcher|Postdoc @ Stanford' _includes/about.md _layouts/default.html
git status --short --branch; grep -nE 'Postdoctoral Researcher|Postdoc @ Stanford' _includes/about.md _layouts/default.html; git diff HEAD^ HEAD --stat
